note.zh: 在 Claude Code 中以 Claude Fable 5（Max 思考配额）一次生成，本页为未经修改的原始产出。与「Claude 网页版」条目同模型、不同 Harness——两个标签页并排即可对比同一模型在不同运行环境下的差异。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Claude Fable 5 (Max effort) inside Claude Code; this page is the unmodified original output. Same model as the Claude Web App entry but a different harness — compare the two tabs to see how the environment shapes the result.

note.zh: 在 Claude Code 中以 Claude Fable 5（Max 思考配额）一次生成。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Claude Fable 5 (Max effort) inside Claude Code.

note.zh: Claude Fable 5(Max 思考档位)在 Claude Code 中用仓库标准中文提示词(仅按案例规则填写文末【本次运行】占位符)一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行,任何 bug 均不修复。自命名「地头蛇」。诊断:稳健强手——对 baseline 稳定取胜(872:512、1119:307),圈地量足。同为 Fable 5,与 high 档的龟缩(疾风圈地)差距明显,再次印证此模型思考档位越高越敢打。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by Claude Fable 5 (Max effort) in Claude Code from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt (only the [This run] placeholders filled per case rules), with no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished and no bug is ever fixed; this registers the maintainer-executed run. Self-named "地头蛇". Diagnosis: a solid strong performer — beats baselines consistently (872:512, 1119:307) with healthy capture volume. Same model as the High turtle (疾风圈地) yet far stronger, again showing that for Fable 5 more thinking means bolder play.
